business.type_label: solo clinical psychologist / therapist (niche: narcissistic relationships, burnout, high-conflict divorce)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding whether to trust a specific licensed professional; the page sells defined clinical expertise via credentials (Psy.D., forensic training, 20yr practice), personal lived-experience narrative, and media/press proof.

goal.one_action: Submit the 'Work With Dr. Cynthia' inquiry form to start working with her (secondary: opt in for the free burnout guide)

structure.archetype_note: Practitioner authority site: home pitch + about/credentials + media proof + owned podcast + lead-magnet + blog, all funneling to one Tally inquiry form.

mapped.observed_as: If You're Here, Something Isn't Adding Up.
Helping Women Navigate Narcissistic Relationships, Partner Addiction, Burnout, and High-Conflict Divorce.
A Different Kind of Clinical Perspective
You Don't Have To Do This Alone
Is your relationship fueling your burnout? (free-guide opt-in)
RECENT MEDIA CONTRIBUTIONS + media logo wall
You Don't Have To Figure This Out Alone / WORK WITH DR. CYNTHIA
Bio/credential block, PSYPACT + PPA badges, Psychology Today link

unmapped.observed: The Mama Shrink Podcast — 6 embedded episode entries (DARVO, trauma bonding, divorce recovery)
unmapped.why_no_fit: An owned standing podcast library is a content property, not a one-off section; no canonical section id covers an episode index

proposed_new.name: media-hub
proposed_new.evidence: Dedicated /mama-shrink-podcast page hosting an owned podcast with 6+ dated episode entries — a standing content property beyond a blog.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; clear trust-engine practitioner site. Minor gap: primary Tally form fields not exposed in static markup, but mechanism (form) and intent are unambiguous.

gap_findings: Owned podcast library (media-hub) has no canonical section or closed-vocab capability.
Squarespace /cart commerce assets load with no products/pricing shown — likely theme leftover, not a real capability.
